message:
fix(api,nn): clippy compliance and dead-code cleanup across einsum and dropout

ft-api:
- Consolidate duplicate einsum branch arms for batch/free_lhs/contract chars
  into unified conditions, reducing code duplication
- Replace manual range comparison with contains() for clippy compliance
- Suppress unused variable warnings in SVD test (u, vh not inspected)
- Convert vec![] literals to array literals where size is known at compile time

ft-nn:
- Remove redundant 1* multiplications in Dropout2d/3d test tensor sizes
  (e.g., vec![1.0; 1 * 8 * 2 * 2] → vec![1.0; 8 * 2 * 2])
- Suppress unused variable warning in EmbeddingBag sum mode test
- Convert vec![] to array literals for CTC loss test logits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
